chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask anything about your CRM data
chat.empty: Start a new conversation by typing your question above.
chat.welcomeMessage: Operate your CRM with natural language — look up customers, create quotations, log activities, view analytics.

examplePrompts.topCustomers: Which 5 customers contribute the most revenue?
examplePrompts.createQuotation: Create a quotation AC01 x 10 for the first customer
examplePrompts.logCall: Log a call with ABC Company about their Q4 plans

errors.rateLimited: You're sending messages too quickly. Please wait a moment.

config.title: AI Configuration
config.subtitle: Manage AI provider, model and access controls
config.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are a helpful CRM assistant…

fields.endpointUrlHint: Must be an http(s) URL. e.g. OpenAI = <openai>{{openaiUrl}}</openai>, OpenRouter = <openrouter>{{openrouterUrl}}</openrouter>, self-hosted vLLM = <vllm>{{vllmUrl}}</vllm>.
fields.apiKeyCurrentHint: Current key: {{mask}} (enter a new key to overwrite)
fields.apiKeyHint: Must be re-entered on every save — never pre-filled or persisted in the client.
fields.modelNameHint: Model identifier supported by your provider. Common: gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022, llama-3.1-70b.
fields.systemPromptPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the default prompt in packages/ai/src/prompts.ts.
fields.systemPromptHint: Overrides the default system prompt. Supports multi-line; blank uses default.
fields.adminOnly: This page is for administrators only.

providerCard.title: LLM Provider
providerCard.description: Use any OpenAI-compatible endpoint — supports OpenAI, OpenRouter, Together, self-hosted vLLM / Ollama, etc. The API key is encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM; the GET endpoint returns only a masked version.
